name: Sales Contract / Purchase Agreement
description: A contract governing the sale and purchase of goods between a seller and a buyer.

sections.title: 1. Parties
sections.content: This Sales Contract ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} between {{seller_name}}, located at {{seller_address}} (the "Seller"), and {{buyer_name}}, located at {{buyer_address}} (the "Buyer").

sections.title: 2. Description of Goods
3. Purchase Price and Payment
sections.content: The total purchase price for the Goods is {{purchase_price}} (the "Purchase Price"). Payment shall be made by {{payment_method}} and is due on or before {{payment_due_date}}. Time of payment is of the essence.

sections.title: 4. Delivery
sections.content: The Seller shall deliver the Goods to {{delivery_location}} by {{delivery_date}}. Risk of loss shall transfer to the Buyer upon delivery. The Buyer shall inspect the Goods upon delivery and notify the Seller of any defects or non-conformities within 5 business days.

sections.title: 5. Title and Risk
sections.content: Title to the Goods shall pass from the Seller to the Buyer upon receipt of full payment of the Purchase Price. Until full payment is received, the Seller retains title to the Goods.

sections.title: 6. Warranties
sections.content: The Seller warrants that: (a) the Seller has good title to the Goods and the right to sell them; (b) the Goods are free from any liens or encumbrances; (c) the Goods conform to the description in this Agreement. Except as stated herein, the Goods are sold "AS IS" without further warranty.

sections.title: 7. Defects and Returns
sections.content: If the Goods are found to be defective or non-conforming, the Buyer shall notify the Seller within 5 business days of delivery. The Seller shall, at its option, repair, replace, or refund the purchase price for the defective Goods. Returns must be made in the original condition and packaging.

sections.title: 8. Force Majeure
sections.content: Neither party shall be liable for delays or failure to perform caused by circumstances beyond their reasonable control, including natural disasters, war, pandemics, or government actions. The affected party shall notify the other party promptly and shall resume performance as soon as practicable.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall either party be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages. The total liability of either party shall not exceed the Purchase Price.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law}}.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Sales Contract as of the date first written above.

{{seller_name}} (Seller)
Signature: _______________________
Name: ___________________________
Title: ___________________________
Date: ____________________________

{{buyer_name}} (Buyer)
Signature: _______________________
Name: ___________________________
Title: ___________________________
Date: ____________________________
